scripts.predev: powershell -NoProfile -Command "try{$c=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction Stop;$p=Get-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue;if($p){$p|Stop-Process -Force;Start-Sleep 1}}catch{};Remove-Item -Path '.next/dev/lock','.next/lock' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue;New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path '.next/webpack-cache' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue|Out-Null"
scripts.clean:next: if exist ".next" (rmdir /s /q ".next" & echo Removed) else (echo Nothing to remove)
scripts.clean:cache: if exist "node_modules\.cache" (rmdir /s /q "node_modules\.cache" & echo Removed) else (echo Nothing to remove)
scripts.clean: npm run clean:next && npm run clean:cache
scripts.fresh: npm run kill && npm run clean && npm run db:sync && npm run dev
scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm run build:local
scripts.db:reset: npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
scripts.db:sync: npm run db:push && npm run db:generate && npm run db:seed && npm run db:seed:analytics
scripts.db:sync:fast: node check-prisma.js || (npm run db:push && npm run db:generate && npm run db:seed && npm run db:seed:analytics && node check-prisma.js --update)
scripts.setup: npm run kill && npm run clean:next && npm run db:reset
scripts.verify: npm run db:push && npm run build
scripts.verify:full: npm run db:push && npm run build && npm run lint && npm run typecheck
